content.query:
SELECT [Move_Primary_key]
,[Unit_Nbr]
,[Event_Type_Id]
,[Move_Kind]
,[From_Location]
,[To_Location]
,[From_Position_Name]
,[To_Position_Name]
,[CHE_Operator_Id]
,[CHE_Id]
,[CHE_Kind]
,[move_time]
,[Freight_Kind_Id]
,[Year]
,[Month]
,[Week]
,[move_date]
SELECT COUNT(*)
 FROM [dbo].[rtg_session_moves]
 WHERE 
 DATEPART("day",move_time) = 14 And Year= 2026 and Month = 2 

 SELECT SUM(Total_Moves) from [dbo].[rtg_session_productivity]
 WHERE 
 move_date='2026-02-14'
